name: tokenselect-kv-cache

paperTitle: TokenSelect - Efficient Long-Context Inference via Dynamic Token-Level KV Cache Selection
content:
## TokenSelect

### Core Concept

Dynamically select which tokens to cache, reducing memory for long-context LLM inference

### Implementation

Implement the key technique by:
1. Processing inputs with appropriate encoders
2. Applying the core algorithm
3. Generating outputs and evaluating results

This skill provides foundations for Dynamically select which tokens to cache, reducing memory for long-context LLM inference.

### When to Use

- Goal aligns with technique purpose

- Evaluation metrics available

### When NOT to Use

- Requires domain-specific customization
- Data format incompatible
- Real-time constraints extreme
